zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Leghe於1356年出生在英國素瑞時，她的父親John Leghe II56歲，母親Agnes Northwode46歲。她和William De Weston V至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她於1366年住在英國素瑞韋斯特 可藍頓。她去世於1449年在英國素瑞享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Leghe于1356年出生在英国素瑞时，她的父亲John Leghe II56岁，母亲Agnes Northwode46岁。她和William De Weston V至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她于1366年住在英国素瑞韋斯特 可藍頓。她去世于1449年在英国素瑞享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leghe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Laiguille: habitational name from L'Aiguille, a place in Pas-de-Calais. The surname Laiguille is virtually non-existing in France.
In some cases probably also French (Legué): topographic name, with fused masculine definite article le, for someone who lived by a ford, gué (see Gue 2).

History: In North America, this surname (see 1 above) developed from a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by Jean Louismet dit Laiguille (or Louismet-Laiguille), a soldier from Dunkerque in Nord, France, who married Marie-Catherine Marquet dit Périgord in Quebec City, QC, in 1757.

variants.name: Gue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Giraud.
French (Gué): topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, gué, from Old French wad ‘ford, crossing place’. Compare Dugue and Legue .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Leghe was born in 1356, in Surrey, England, her father, John Leghe II, was 56 and her mother, Agnes Northwode, was 46. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with William De Weston V. She lived in West Clandon, Surrey, England in 1366. She died in 1449, in Surrey, England, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Leghe est née en 1356, à Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John Leghe II, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Agnes Northwode, avait 46 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec William De Weston V. Elle a vécu à West Clandon, Surrey, Angleterre en 1366. Elle est décédée en 1449, à Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Leghe 1356 in Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Leghe II 56 und ihre Mutter Agnes Northwode 46. Sie hatte mit William De Weston V mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1366 hat sie in West Clandon, Surrey, England gelebt. Sie starb 1449 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Leghe è nata il nel 1356 nel Surrey, England, sua padre, John Leghe II, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Agnes Northwode, aveva 46 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con William De Weston V. Vissuto a West Clandon, Surrey, England nel 1366. Morì nel 1449, nel Surrey, England, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Legheが1356年にイギリススリーで生まれた時，父John Leghe IIは56歳，母Agnes Northwodeは46歳であった。彼女はWilliam De Weston Vとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1366年にはイギリススリーウエスト クランドンに住んでいた。彼女は1449年にイギリススリーで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Leghe(이)가 1356년 영국 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Leghe II(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Northwode(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 William De Weston V(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1366년도에 영국 수리 웨스트 클랜던에서 살았다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 수리에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Leghe nasceu em 1356, em Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Leghe II, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Northwode, tinha 46 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com William De Weston V. Ela viveu em West Clandon, Surrey, Inglaterra em 1366. Ela faleceu em 1449, em Surrey, Inglaterra, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Leghe родилась в 1356 г. в местности сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени John Leghe II было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Northwode, 46. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от William De Weston V. Она жила в местности вест кландон, сурри, Англия в 1366 году. Она умерла в 1449 г. в местности сурри, Англия в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Leghe nació en 1356, en Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, John Leghe II, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Agnes Northwode, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con William De Weston V. Vivió en West Clandon, Surrey, Inglaterra en 1366. Murió en 1449, en Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años.
